title: Update architecture spec from decision
rationale: This decision indicates durable architecture guidance that should stay documented.
proposed_summary: Task packets represent durable intent while run records capture each execution attempt; separate storage under .sidecar/runs enables multiple attempts and clean task-to-runs querying.
proposed_patch_text:
## Constraints
- Task packets represent durable intent while run records capture each execution attempt; separate storage under .sidecar/runs enables multiple attempts and clean task-to-runs querying.
